~!S as Eto
SSS as One Eyed Owl!~

Eto is an executive of Aogiri Tree from the 24th ward. Eto is often seen interacting with fellow Aogiri member [Tatara](https://anilist.co/character/88418/Tatara).

~!She is the daughter of [Yoshimura](https://anilist.co/character/136024/Yoshimura), and the half-Ghoul known as the One-Eyed Owl. Her human identity is Sen Takatsuki (高槻 泉), a best-selling horror novelist mentioned throughout the series. Her relation with the One-Eyed King is unclear. However the CCG and [Nico](https://anilist.co/character/88419/Nico) speculate that they are the same person.!~
